title: My Joe Rogan Appearance: What I Learned (ft. Young Jamie & Viktor Hovland)
summary: Jesse Michels discusses his appearance on the Joe Rogan Experience and hosts a special episode featuring Young Jamie (Joe Rogan's producer) and professional golfer Viktor Hovland at a golf course in Austin. The conversation covers UFO evidence, ancient civilizations, government secrecy around advanced technology, and the physics of exotic propulsion.

acronyms.definition: A theoretical form of AI that can perform any intellectual task that a human can
US government department that manages nuclear facilities and secret science programs
Research and development agency of the US Department of Defense
Modern term for UFOs used by government and military

events.description: UAP crash in Magenta, Italy under Mussolini's regime, later recovered by Americans
Italian UAP material moved to secure air base until end of fascist regime
Ghost rockets observed in Sweden, over a thousand V2-like objects with anomalous capabilities
Atomic Energy Act established classification rules for nuclear materials

key_claims.claim: Richard Bissell, designer of Area 51, mentioned the 1933 Magenta crash to Harold Malmgren
The Vatican back-channeled information about Italian UAP recoveries to Americans
Harold Malmgren's Wikipedia page was changed after his interview to discredit him
Avi Loeb worked on the Star Wars program
DOE manages all nuclear sites across the US and has the tightest security since Los Alamos
Back to the Future references Thomas Townsend Brown's experiments with the flux capacitor and Pasadena location
Close Encounters of the Third Kind references two crates representing advanced R&D programs at Lockheed and Northrop
The Cosmatron at Brookhaven National Labs is the largest particle accelerator in the US
Jake Barber claims to have physically handled recovered craft
Skywatcher groups claim to have a 'dog whistle' frequency that attracts UFOs 100% of the time
